title: Audio Books Page on my Website Tour - Stoned

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a tour of the free audio history books section on his website, explaining how he organizes 1,159 books across 15 sections and 9 world regions, with color coding, sorting by length, and metadata like chapter counts, page counts, and listening hours. He highlights the Mahabharata as the longest book at 213+ hours and describes his layout plans.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: dividing by size is a good way to organize
switching to horizontal block sections because seeing the book cover in one glance is better
his website is the best and possibly only place to download the computer-voiced version
fun to pair long audiobooks with long rides
